description_long: This is a large, single-family house set within a fenced lot, featuring a spacious front yard with a driveway and a rear garden area. The house has a complex, multi-gabled roof with dark shingles and several dormer windows, giving it a stately appearance. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted siding, and the structure includes multiple large windows and glass doors, especially facing the backyard. The backyard is landscaped with a pool, patio, and several trees, providing a private recreational space. The property is bordered by a low wall and is adjacent to a street with parked cars, indicating an urban or suburban neighborhood context. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch with columns and steps leading up from the driveway.
description: A large, light-colored house with a multi-gabled dark roof, landscaped front and back yards, and a prominent entry porch, set within a fenced lot in an urban neighborhood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, front yard, and street with parked cars.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a pool, patio, and garden features, as well as the garage area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back facade, large windows, and landscaped garden with trees and a pool.
description_view_3: Angled rear/side view showing the backyard, pool, and the side of the house with additional trees and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors facing the backyard
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps leading to the main door, and a prominent entry path from the driveway
